title: Catoon spear sounds
description: Adds cartoony sounds to your spear!
body: It changes all of the spear sounds to goofy cartoon ones! You are allowed to use this pack in your modpacks BUT YOU CANT TAKE IT CAN CALL IT YOURS >:( I have ran out of things to say. Welp Umm here's a inspirational quote "But you always have to remember, not everything is possible, sure maybe you can build a worden spoon and such, but dont let stuff that dont work stump you down. Never give up if no matter what you do and it wont work just take a breather drink something like water and try again! If that doesn't work maybe there is a reason! Just remember never push yourself"
